title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXV. Scholastic.
content:
[A laconic reply to a person who indulges much in supposition.]

                        If ifs and ands,
                        Were pots and pans,
        There would be no need for tinkers!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXV. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
